name: Skinny Shrimp Scampi
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow 1-1/2 quart microwave-safe dish, microwave margarine on HIGH power for 55 to 60 seconds or until melted.
2. Stir in lemon juice, garlic, butter-flavored salt, and black pepper.
3. Add shrimp. Microwave on HIGH for 1-1/2 minutes.
4. Rearrange the shrimp, moving them to the center of the dish.
5. Continue microwaving on HIGH for another 1-1/2 minutes or until the shrimp turn pink.
6. Sprinkle with fresh parsley.
YIELD: 4 servings (177 calories each serving)
Carb: 1.9 g
Protein: 27.6 g
Fat: 6.2 g
